disabled_patterns.grasp_lost: gripper command/state alone does not establish an object grasp relation
disabled_patterns.timeout_near_goal: canonical features contain no task-specific goal-distance proxy
disabled_patterns.wrong_object_interaction: canonical features contain no object pose, contact, or target-object identity

claim_boundary: Deterministic observable pattern index; unknown is preserved and no pattern is a root cause.
